flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Niagara University rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($21.2k → $24.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Niagara University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
